title: die in water
description: You should better not touch water in survival (idk why someone asked me to make it...)
body:
You should better not touch water!

Here a simple datapack requested by a random to get kill as soon as it touches water lol.



Use 
```
/trigger enable-die-in-water
```
 to enable it (off by default if I don't say mistake), and

```
/trigger disable-die-in-water
```
 disable it.
